WebLink.url: {! IF( OR(LEN($Site.Name) == 0, ISBLANK($Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Community_Base_URL__c)), URLFOR("/apex/sugati__HolidayEnquiry?Id=" + Account.Id), URLFOR($Site.Prefix & $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Community_Base_URL__c & URLENCODE('/apex/sugati__HolidayEnquiry?Id=') + Account.Id) ) }
